survey.title: Title
survey.permanentLink: This link is permanent and won't change.
survey.noSurveys: No surveys yet. Create your first one!
survey.noSurveysHint: Click "Blank survey" above to create your first one

builder.noSectionsHint: Add a section to start building your survey

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.error: Open time must be before close time

identification.title: Responder Identification
identification.hint: Collect respondent info before showing the survey.

resultSettings.title: Result Settings
resultSettings.disableScoringHint: Hides all point fields. Score will not be calculated.
resultSettings.combineResultScreensHint: Show all section results together at the end instead of after each section.
resultSettings.sectionResultsCombinedNote: These section results will be shown together at the end of the survey.
resultSettings.noResultScreen: No result screen will be shown to respondents.

email.title: Email Automation
email.subject: Email Subject
email.imageTooLarge: Image too large ({{size}} MB). Max 5 MB.
email.invalidImageType: Only image files are supported (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP).
email.enableHint: Send respondents a personalised email with their results.
email.emailFieldRequired: Enable the Email field in Responder Identification to use email automation.
email.htmlHint: HTML is supported. Use {{score}} to insert the respondent's score.
email.uploadHint: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP · max 5 MB

branchRules.title: Branch Logic
branchRules.noRules: No rules yet. Add one below to redirect respondents based on their answers or score.
branchRules.needsMoreSections: Add at least one more section to the canvas before configuring jumps.
branchRules.needsChoiceQuestion: Add a Multiple choice question to this section first.
branchRules.hiddenTargetWarning: 1 rule references a hidden section or question and will be skipped by respondents.
branchRules.hiddenTargetsWarning: {{count}} rules reference hidden sections or questions and will be skipped by respondents.

publish.noTitle: Survey title is required — add it in the Settings panel on the left.
publish.noQuestions: Add at least one visible question to the canvas before publishing.
publish.scheduleError: Schedule error: open time must be before close time (check Settings → Schedule).
publish.missingText1: 1 question is missing its prompt text — look for the amber badge.
publish.missingTextMany: {{count}} questions are missing prompt text — look for amber badges.
publish.missingText1Question: "{{n}}" is missing its prompt text — add it or delete the question.
publish.emptyOption1: 1 option has a blank label — fill it in or delete it.
publish.emptyOptionMany: {{count}} options have blank labels — fill them in or delete them.
publish.emptyOption1Question: "{{label}}" has 1 option with a blank label — fill it in or delete it.
publish.emptyOptionManyQuestion: "{{label}}" has {{count}} options with blank labels — fill them in or delete them.
publish.autoLocked: Survey locked while editing — click Unlock to publish your changes.
publish.clickToJump: Click an issue to jump to it in the canvas.

text.noPoints: Text questions do not contribute to the score.

choice.minOptionsWarning: Add at least 2 options for respondents to choose from.

scale.useValueAsPointsOn: Selecting {{max}} awards {{max}} pts; selecting {{min}} awards {{min}} pts.
scale.useValueAsPointsOff: Scale response will not contribute to the score.
scale.rangeError: Max must be greater than min

general.title: General
general.languageHint: Sets the display language shown to respondents.
general.allowDuplicatesHint: When off, the same identification cannot be used to submit more than once.

qr.title: QR Code
qr.logoHint: PNG, JPG, SVG or WebP · max 2 MB · displayed in the QR center.
qr.cropHint: Drag to reposition · use sliders to adjust

responder.surveyLocked: This survey is not accepting responses right now.
responder.identificationSubtitle: This information will be recorded with your response.
responder.addTag: Add a tag and press Enter
responder.sessionRestoredHint: Resuming from where you left off.
responder.duplicateBlocked: You have already completed this survey.
responder.duplicateBlockedHint: Only one response per person is allowed.

result.noRange: Thank you for completing the survey!

responses.title: Responses
responses.selectToView: Select a response to view details
responses.noFiltersMatch: No responses match the current filters.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
